### Submission Checklist

#### Code Quality
- [ ] Code follows the Synapse plugin structure
- [ ] Code is well-commented and readable
- [ ] No unused code or dependencies
- [ ] Error handling is implemented
- [ ] Code follows ESLint/Prettier standards (if applicable)

#### Documentation
- [ ] README.md with comprehensive documentation
- [ ] Installation instructions are clear
- [ ] Usage examples are provided
- [ ] Configuration options are documented
- [ ] API documentation (if applicable)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md included

#### Testing
- [ ] Plugin has been thoroughly tested
- [ ] Tests are included (unit/integration)
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] Tested on multiple platforms
- [ ] Tested with minimum required Synapse version

#### Package
- [ ] package.json includes all required fields
- [ ] Version follows semantic versioning
- [ ] License is specified
- [ ] Dependencies are listed correctly
- [ ] Scripts are defined (if needed)

#### Security & Best Practices
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials or secrets
- [ ] Input validation implemented
- [ ] External dependencies are reviewed
- [ ] No known security vulnerabilities
- [ ] Follows security best practices

#### Compliance
- [ ] License is compatible with Synapse
- [ ] No copyright violations
- [ ] Attribution provided for third-party code
- [ ] Contribution guidelines followed

### Additional Notes
<!-- Any additional information for reviewers -->


---
**For Reviewers:**

#### Initial Review
- [ ] Plugin name is unique and descriptive
- [ ] Category is appropriate
- [ ] Documentation is comprehensive
- [ ] License is compatible

#### Code Review
- [ ] Code quality meets standards
- [ ] Architecture is sound
- [ ] Error handling is adequate
- [ ] Performance is acceptable
- [ ] Security considerations addressed

#### Testing Review
- [ ] Tests are comprehensive
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing successful
- [ ] Edge cases covered

#### Documentation Review
- [ ] README is clear and complete
- [ ] Examples are helpful
- [ ] Configuration is well-documented
- [ ] Installation instructions work

#### Final Approval
- [ ] Ready to merge
- [ ] Needs revisions (see comments)
- [ ] Rejected (see comments)
